clientDescription: A client for interacting with Amazon Simple Notification Service (SNS) to publish messages, manage topics, subscriptions, platform applications, and endpoints.

functions.name: publish
functions.description: Sends a message to an Amazon SNS topic, a text message (SMS message) directly to a phone number, or a message to a mobile platform endpoint (when you specify the TargetArn).

functions.name: publishBatch
functions.description: Publishes up to 10 messages to the specified topic in a single batch.

functions.name: subscribe
functions.description: Subscribes an endpoint to an Amazon SNS topic.

functions.name: unsubscribe
functions.description: Deletes a subscription.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: confirmSubscription
functions.description: Verifies an endpoint owner's intent to receive messages by validating the token sent to the endpoint by an earlier Subscribe action.

functions.name: createTopic
functions.description: Creates a topic to which notifications can be published.

functions.name: deleteTopic
functions.description: Deletes a topic and all its subscriptions.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getTopicAttributes
functions.description: Returns all of the properties of a topic.

functions.name: setTopicAttributes
functions.description: Allows a topic owner to set an attribute of the topic to a new value.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listTopics
functions.description: Returns a list of the requester's topics.

functions.name: createPlatformApplication
functions.description: Creates a platform application object for one of the supported push notification services, such as APNS and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging), to which devices and mobile apps may register.

functions.name: deletePlatformApplication
functions.description: Deletes a platform application object for one of the supported push notification services, such as APNS and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getPlatformApplicationAttributes
functions.description: Retrieves the attributes of the platform application object for the supported push notification services, such as APNS and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

functions.name: setPlatformApplicationAttributes
functions.description: Sets the attributes of the platform application object for the supported push notification services, such as APNS and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: createPlatformEndpoint
functions.description: Creates an endpoint for a device and mobile app on one of the supported push notification services, such as GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) and APNS.

functions.name: deleteEndpoint
functions.description: Deletes the endpoint for a device and mobile app from Amazon SNS.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getEndpointAttributes
functions.description: Retrieves the endpoint attributes for a device on one of the supported push notification services, such as GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) and APNS.

functions.name: setEndpointAttributes
functions.description: Sets the attributes for an endpoint for a device on one of the supported push notification services, such as GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) and APNS.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listEndpointsByPlatformApplication
functions.description: Lists the endpoints and endpoint attributes for devices in a supported push notification service, such as GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) and APNS.

functions.name: listSubscriptions
functions.description: Returns a list of the requester's subscriptions.

functions.name: listSubscriptionsByTopic
functions.description: Returns a list of the subscriptions to a specific topic.

functions.name: getSubscriptionAttributes
functions.description: Returns all of the properties of a subscription.

functions.name: setSubscriptionAttributes
functions.description: Allows a subscription owner to set an attribute of the subscription to a new value.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: addPermission
functions.description: Adds a statement to a topic's access control policy, granting access for the specified Amazon Web Services accounts to the specified actions.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: removePermission
functions.description: Removes a statement from a topic's access control policy.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getSMSAttributes
functions.description: Returns the settings for sending SMS messages from your Amazon Web Services account.

functions.name: checkIfPhoneNumberIsOptedOut
functions.description: Accepts a phone number and indicates whether the phone holder has opted out of receiving SMS messages from your Amazon Web Services account.

functions.name: listPhoneNumbersOptedOut
functions.description: Returns a list of phone numbers that are opted out, meaning you cannot send SMS messages to them.

functions.name: optInPhoneNumber
functions.description: Use this request to opt in a phone number that is opted out, which enables you to resume sending SMS messages to the number.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listPlatformApplications
functions.description: Lists the platform application objects for the supported push notification services, such as APNS and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

functions.name: tagResource
functions.description: Add tags to the specified Amazon SNS topic.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: untagResource
functions.description: Remove tags from the specified Amazon SNS topic.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listTagsForResource
functions.description: List all tags added to the specified Amazon SNS topic.

functions.name: putDataProtectionPolicy
functions.description: Adds or updates an inline policy document that is stored in the specified Amazon SNS topic.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getDataProtectionPolicy
functions.description: Retrieves the specified inline DataProtectionPolicy document that is stored in the specified Amazon SNS topic.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The topic you want to publish to.

fields.name: targetArn
fields.description: If you don't specify a value for the TargetArn parameter, you must specify a value for the PhoneNumber or TopicArn parameters.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.description: The phone number to which you want to deliver an SMS message.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The message you want to send.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Optional parameter to be used as the "Subject" line when the message is delivered to email endpoints.

fields.name: messageStructure
fields.description: Set MessageStructure to json if you want to send a different message for each protocol.

fields.name: messageAttributes
fields.description: Message attributes for Publish action.

fields.name: messageGroupId
fields.description: The MessageGroupId can contain up to 128 alphanumeric characters (a-z, A-Z, 0-9) and punctuation (!"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~).

fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier assigned to the published message.

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.description: This response element applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) topics.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the topic you want to batch publish to.

fields.name: publishBatchRequestEntries
fields.description: A list of PublishBatch request entries to be sent to the SNS topic.

fields.name: successful
fields.description: A list of successful PublishBatch responses.

fields.name: failed
fields.description: A list of failed PublishBatch responses.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic you want to subscribe to.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: The protocol that you want to use.

fields.name: endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint that you want to receive notifications.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

fields.name: returnSubscriptionArn
fields.description: Sets whether the response from the Subscribe request includes the subscription ARN, even if the subscription is not yet confirmed.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The ARN of the subscription if it is confirmed, or the string "pending confirmation" if the subscription requires confirmation.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The ARN of the subscription to be deleted.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic for which you wish to confirm a subscription.

fields.name: token
fields.description: Short-lived token sent to an endpoint during the Subscribe action.

fields.name: authenticateOnUnsubscribe
fields.description: Disallows unauthenticated unsubscribes of the subscription.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The ARN of the created subscription.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the topic you want to create.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: The list of tags to add to a new topic.

fields.name: dataProtectionPolicy
fields.description: The body of the policy document you want to use for this topic.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the created topic.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic you want to delete.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic whose properties you want to get.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of the topic's attributes.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic to modify.

fields.name: attributeName
fields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

fields.name: attributeValue
fields.description: The new value for the attribute.

fields.name: topics
fields.description: A list of topic ARNs.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Token to pass along to the next ListTopics request.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Application names must be made up of only uppercase and lowercase ASCII letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and periods, and must be between 1 and 256 characters long.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: The following platforms are supported: ADM (Amazon Device Messaging), APNS (Apple Push Notification Service), APNS_SANDBOX, and GCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging).

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: For a list of attributes, see SetPlatformApplicationAttributes.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn is returned.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn of platform application object to delete.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn for GetPlatformApplicationAttributesInput.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Attributes include the following:

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn for SetPlatformApplicationAttributes action.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of the platform application attributes.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn returned from CreatePlatformApplication is used to create an endpoint.

fields.name: token
fields.description: Unique identifier created by the notification service for an app on a device.

fields.name: customUserData
fields.description: Arbitrary user data to associate with the endpoint.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: For a list of attributes, see SetEndpointAttributes.

fields.name: endpointArn
fields.description: EndpointArn returned from CreateEndpoint action.

fields.name: endpointArn
fields.description: EndpointArn of endpoint to delete.

fields.name: endpointArn
fields.description: EndpointArn for GetEndpointAttributes input.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Attributes include the following:

fields.name: endpointArn
fields.description: EndpointArn used for SetEndpointAttributes action.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of the endpoint attributes.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn for ListEndpointsByPlatformApplicationInput action.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: NextToken string is used when calling ListEndpointsByPlatformApplication action to retrieve additional records that are available after the first page results.

fields.name: endpoints
fields.description: Endpoints returned for ListEndpointsByPlatformApplication action.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: NextToken string is returned when calling ListEndpointsByPlatformApplication action if additional records are available after the first page results.

fields.name: subscriptions
fields.description: A list of subscriptions.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Token to pass along to the next ListSubscriptions request.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic for which you wish to find subscriptions.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Token returned by the previous ListSubscriptionsByTopic request.

fields.name: subscriptions
fields.description: A list of subscriptions.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Token to pass along to the next ListSubscriptionsByTopic request.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The ARN of the subscription whose properties you want to get.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of the subscription's attributes.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The ARN of the subscription to modify.

fields.name: attributeName
fields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

fields.name: attributeValue
fields.description: The new value for the attribute in JSON format.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic whose access control policy you wish to modify.

fields.name: label
fields.description: A unique identifier for the new policy statement.

fields.name: awsAccountIds
fields.description: The Amazon Web Services account IDs of the users (principals) who will be given access to the specified actions.

fields.name: actionNames
fields.description: The action you want to allow for the specified principal(s).

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic whose access control policy you wish to modify.

fields.name: label
fields.description: The unique label of the statement you want to remove.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: The SMS attribute names and their values.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.description: The phone number for which you want to check the opt out status.

fields.name: isOptedOut
fields.description: Indicates whether the phone number is opted out.

fields.name: phoneNumbers
fields.description: A list of phone numbers that are opted out of receiving SMS messages.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: A NextToken string is returned when you call the ListPhoneNumbersOptedOut action if additional records are available after the first page of results.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.description: The phone number to opt in.

fields.name: platformApplications
fields.description: Platform applications returned when calling ListPlatformApplications action.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: NextToken string is returned when calling ListPlatformApplications action if additional records are available after the first page results.

fields.name: resourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic to which to add tags.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: The tags to be added to the specified topic.

fields.name: resourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic from which to remove tags.

fields.name: tagKeys
fields.description: The list of tag keys to remove from the specified topic.

fields.name: resourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic for which to list tags.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: The tags associated with the specified topic.

fields.name: resourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic whose DataProtectionPolicy you want to add or update.

fields.name: dataProtectionPolicy
fields.description: The JSON serialization of the topic's DataProtectionPolicy.

fields.name: resourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the topic whose DataProtectionPolicy you want to get.

fields.name: dataProtectionPolicy
fields.description: Retrieves the DataProtectionPolicy in JSON string format.

fields.name: dataType
fields.description: Amazon SNS supports the following logical data types: String, String.Array, Number, and Binary.

fields.name: stringValue
fields.description: Strings are Unicode with UTF8 binary encoding.

fields.name: binaryValue
fields.description: Binary type attributes can store any binary data, for example, compressed data, encrypted data, or images.

fields.name: id
fields.description: An identifier for the message in this batch.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The body of the message.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The subject of the batch message.

fields.name: messageStructure
fields.description: Set MessageStructure to json if you want to send a different message for each protocol.

fields.name: messageAttributes
fields.description: Each message attribute consists of a Name, Type, and Value.

fields.name: messageDeduplicationId
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) topics.

fields.name: messageGroupId
fields.description: FIFO topics: The tag that specifies that a message belongs to a specific message group.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Id of an entry in a batch request.

fields.name: messageId
fields.description: An identifier for the message.

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) topics.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Id of an entry in a batch request.

fields.name: code
fields.description: An error code representing why the action failed on this entry.

fields.name: message
fields.description: A message explaining why the action failed on this entry.

fields.name: senderFault
fields.description: Specifies whether the error happened due to the caller of the batch API action.

fields.name: key
fields.description: The required key portion of the tag.

fields.name: value
fields.description: The optional value portion of the tag.

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The topic's ARN.

fields.name: endpointArn
fields.description: The EndpointArn for mobile app and device.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Attributes for endpoint.

fields.name: subscriptionArn
fields.description: The subscription's ARN.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: The subscription's owner.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: The subscription's protocol.

fields.name: endpoint
fields.description: The subscription's endpoint (format depends on the protocol).

fields.name: topicArn
fields.description: The ARN of the subscription's topic.

fields.name: platformApplicationArn
fields.description: PlatformApplicationArn for platform application object.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Attributes for platform application object.
